purpose: Finite quotation-term closure domain for the current substitution graph formula candidate and finite evaluation examples. This checks that every graph-domain code currently exercised by those surfaces quotes to a closed nested sequence term that recovers the original token sequence and round-trips through the formal codebook, without claiming a general formula correctness proof.
next_as_action: Use this finite closure domain as evidence for the quotation-term-closure proof case, then prove the general graph-domain quotation closure property before promoting the correctness case.
